image_prompt: The Summit of Scars, The highest, most perilous peak in the known world, perpetually shrouded in swirling storms and rumored to be the source of immense cultivation power. It is the ultimate, almost mythical destination for those seeking true mastery, its slopes littered with the relics and fallen warriors of countless failed ascensions., The silence that follows is absolute. Far below, the flashing steel of the sect and the banner of the rearguard vanish instantly, collapsed into a sickening, crimson-stained dust. A terrible, echoing crack of shifting tectonic plates is heard., masterpiece, best quality, cel shading, bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors, anime screencap
motion_prompt: The silence that follows is absolute. Far below, the flashing steel of the sect and the banner of the rearguard vanish instantly, collapsed into a sickening, crimson-stained dust.
